summary: Outstanding audience recording of a phenomenal 1971 show, highlighted by a superb Me & Bobby McGee performance.
review: Both reviewers rave about the musical firepower of this late‑1971 gig, calling it a “phenomenal” and “bounce‑filled” show with several standout versions, especially the Pigpen‑led rendition of Me & Bobby McGee.  The AUD source is praised as a “recording gem,” offering clear, authentic sound despite its age, making the performance shine even brighter.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed, highly positive reviews highlight an excellent performance and a very good audience recording; weighting favors the show (70%) giving a strong overall score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the AUD source sounds authentic and “goldilocks” balanced, with an older‑sounding but clear mix; one reviewer calls it a recording gem while another says it’s decent for its era.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as an awesome, high‑energy sequence where every song “bounces,” delivering multiple standout versions and a strong overall flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Mentioned for his solos – reviewers note differences in his playing compared to nearby shows.
